metadata.seed: I was doing okay, but, I mean, I got comfortable with that extra income, and so now my fear is that I've gotten too comfortable with it, and now that it's not there anymore, it's going to affect the fact I'm not going to be able to pay for food or my rent.

patient.query: Yeah, there was this unexpected car repair last month that really threw me off. I thought I had a little cushion saved up, but it just vanished so quickly. It made me realize how fragile everything feels, like one small thing can just topple the whole stack. And then I start worrying about the next thing that might happen. It's just... exhausting.

I want to be able to feel more in control, but it’s hard to shake that nagging feeling that things could go wrong at any moment.
